title: Ribesiodes madagascariense
taxonomy: Rubesiodes madagascariense is a species of damselfly in the family Coenagrionidae. It belongs to the genus Rubesiodes which is a group of damselflies. The family Coenagrionidae is one of the largest and most widespread families of damselflies. Within the order Odonata, Coenagrionidae is a part of the infraorder Zygoptera. This classification reflects the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Rubesiodes madagascariense and other similar organisms.
